response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and domains, with strong contributions to AI-agent infrastructure, cloud-native tooling, and open-source projects — aligning well with the role’s technical scope. However, his recent career gap and lack of explicit experience with Nest.js, Vitest, and Kubernetes in professional contexts raise questions about immediate readiness for the required stack, though his adaptability and depth suggest he could ramp up quickly.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS, Docker)
Direct experience with AI-agent development and MCP frameworks as requested
Strong open-source contributions and testing culture (Vitest alternatives, TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: Current career gap since October 2025 may impact recent hands-on momentum
No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in professional work history
Limited evidence of direct experience with PostgreSQL, Kubernetes, or Java/Kotlin in enterprise automation contexts
